title: The comment of the function `encode()` not updated after fix the issue 3316 in the issue 5715

comments.body: I had the same issue with outdated comments in the encode() function. Found this resource super helpful for understanding the changes: https://javascriptbuilders.io/url-encoding-axios-buildurl-patterns/ It explains the fix for issue #3316 and how the function behavior was updated.

body: The comment of the function `encode()` isn't updated in `lib/helpers/buildURL.js` after fix the issue #3316 in the issue #5715.
